name: Creed: Rise to Glory - Championship Edition™

reviews.review_description: Game is amazing ima huge rocky fan so I had to buy it everything on game is amazing good physics and what not only real problem pvp can be skittle hard when all you’re opponent does it move in circles other then that it’s amazing . I wish the story was a little bit longer or there was different ones like we could be rocky and do all the rocky fights and I would love to see mason the line Dixon added at some point I feel like it would only make sense with who’s all ready there game is at 10 out of 10

It also doesn’t make sense how opponents can be knocked down 6 times, and you can only be knocked down 3 times. You also seem to have pillow hands, making it nearly impossible to win in 1 try. 

You guys have to fix the damage🤦‍♂️

reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun for me and my friends and the deluxe pack is very funny. Me and my friends beat the campaign and the legacy mode. In all this game is my favorite on the meta vr

Overall the game is good graphics is good but one thing to fix is our character Becuse How is it when I knock out my opponent it takes nine try’s but still isn’t knocked out but he knocked me out 2 times and I was out of the game due to my knockout but it seems no matter how hard I swing it does not work so it seems we have pillow punches so improve on damage plz
I'm playing the game, in a match, about to get hit, I attempt to dodge down, nah, down dodge doesn't exist, like wtf why can I not crouch to dodge instead of dodging left and right

Where do I start? This is one of the best boxing games I’ve played sure thrill of the fight is pretty good but if you are a HUGE Rocky fan you will literally fall Kñ love with this I know I Have Right now I just finished Pro difficulty and I’m gonna go on champion difficulty it’s an Amazing I suggest Getting it when you have the chance.
It's a good game for just fighting in general but one thing I would like to see is my fight record bc God knows how many wins I have😅

I paid $20 for this game and I deleted it instantly. The game doesn’t even have a tutorial and I just wanted to get in all the matches I could, but it didn’t even show me how to that’s why I deleted it and I couldn’t even move. It was so bad. Don’t download this game if you don’t want to waste your money ￼

I enjoy the campaign and free fight, but the PVP is honestly kind of dumb and not fun because most online players like to use the joystick to constantly go in circles, making it virtually impossible to fight them or have any kind of decent competition. I would like it if you were able to find some way to restrict movement to 180s instead of a full 360 constantly because let's be real that is what a chud does. PvP deserves 0 stars as far as I'm concerned

You can tell this game had a dedicated team behind it, which isn't particularly common with some of the newer stuff coming out. The fighting works and it's fun. It reminds me a little of Assassin's Creed, where there is supposed to be a rhythm of sorts, but you can overcome that with pure aggression (even with the stamina limits). There's a decent variety of opponents and locations. Just note that this game is a work out - including the actual workout montages before every fight. Go into it expecting that.

The story is ok. Not great, but it's more than was expected, so I have to give some credit there, too. You basically follow Creed and two of his protégés, with some familiar faces and names along the way.

reviews.review_title: Guys how do I get my money back
reviews.review_description: So I thought of deleting it but I do not know how to delete it and get my money back do any of y’all know

This game is GREAT and I LOVE IT!
But I have some requests for future updates.
Please could there be a sandbox mode where you can choose how powerful your punches are? Also, in the sandbox mode, could there be an option for multiplayer, such as 3v1 or 3v3?
And one last request: could I spawn props like chairs?
Thanks for listening.
Pls add mixed reality.
Have you abandoned this game?
There hasn’t Been any updates? ￼

Career mode and freeplay are a good workout. Good technique is rewarded and your damage actually depends on how hard you throw. The AI in career mode has an unrealistic amount of stamina and health at times, but it can be overlooked. What can't be overlooked is how bad the PVP is. No point in technique when your opponent just starts spamming windmill. When they start treating your head like a speedbag, you might as well leave the match. The hand tracking suddenly becomes trash too, causing your punches to either be soft, or just not register at all. This also causes your defense to not work at all either. Your only real defense in PVP is running away. Game would be great if these issues were fixed.
I will never get this game again just get the demo. Nobody get this game. It’s buns. ￼

(1) ADD MIX REALITY
(2) CREATE A NEW MODE - Rocky Mitt Work Mode, where we mostly train 1 on 1 with Rocky alone and he either has randomized punch and evade or he has a large library of different mitt work trainings.

WARNING - Steam version crashes endlessly. 
Quest Store - PCVR version works.

The game is pretty decent for what it offers. It's still stands along side the newer or more competitive boxing titles. Personally I don't have a lot of space where I played and was constantly peeking out of my headset to make sure I didn't break my hands. I still manage to complete the first story mode at the hardest difficulty. I wanted to play Legacy, but was turned away by the lack of mix reality. Buy it during a deep sale.

Last Developer Comment - Remake the game with updated graphics and refined gameplay mechanics with the above suggestions. Add more fighters, more training modes seperate from the story mode mini training games. Mixed Reality is a must or just update the current game with these features.

BE AWARE, THIS GAME CAN CAUSE SERIOUS HARM.

Game mechanics, apart from being stupid, changes camera view during fight, which may relocate your opponent into places where you have walls in your environment. As the game doesn't have mixed reality mode, you could end up punching walls and parts of environment.   

As for boxing itself. People who developed this game must have studied boxing using pictures on the internet.   

The game mechanics is designed in such way that:
1) your punching power - doesn't matter;
2) your technique - doesn't matter;
3) your footwork - doesn't matter;
The game has its own "rules" for what is considered "boxing".   

If you would try to control space during the fight with footwork (like you normally would in boxing) you would end up with opponent being literally glued to you. Whenever you take step back, opponent will be instantly moved close to you (without any visible leg movement) up to the point where his 3d model is penetrating you body. There's no point to perform any footwork whatsoever.   

This game even fails to deliver decent workout. Because after you figure out "the rules" you have to follow to win the fight, there's not much to do to get you sweat - just keep your hands up, and occasionally counter punch with low effort.   

I could've give it more stars for visuals. But due to it being dangerous can not do.
When i hop into the game i want to fight not get failed at through my block

Out of all games that I have on my meta quest and I got 10+ this one is the worse one so far. It’s not realistic in many ways. For e.g. the hit boxes when I hit the opponent in a very weak spot nothing happens and it doesn’t even land as a hit and these guys take hits like it’s a mosquito bite. The graphics are good but the gameplay got me ragequiting after 4 minutes of playing, and it’s very hard to get me in rage. With small nerves I don’t recommend this game
